name: CV Maker
description: An AI-powered mobile application designed to help job seekers build, customize, and export professional, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes. Integrated with smart templates and instant translation.
features: Instant PDF generation with multiple interactive and customizable templates.
AI-driven resume tailoring (repurposing) to adapt descriptions to target job requirements.
Dual-language translation support (Arabic & English) out of the box.
Secure user authentication and offline caching of resume data.
my_role: Lead Flutter Developer - Designed and built the entire application architecture from scratch. Configured localization pipelines, built dynamic PDF generation logic, implemented AI API integration, and designed the UI/UX using custom animations.
